sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27568" key="difalagga/rxhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐφᾰλαγγ-άρχης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n27568.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leader of a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διφαλαγγαρχία,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
